## Tags
location, waypoint, marker, drop, done, tick, complete, task, added

## Categories
navigation, travel, account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/map-pin-check)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MapPinCheck;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MapPinCheck { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
